antigravity_skill_orchestration.directives: Utilize 'antigravity-design-expert' to create a high-contrast 'L vs Kira' theme. Use 'tailwind-patterns' for ultra-sharp typography and 'performance-optimizer' to ensure sub-second LCP (Largest Contentful Paint).

generation_prompts.landing_page_ui: Design a 'Notebook' inspired UI. 1. HERO: A cinematic split-screen effect. Left: Ryuk in shadows; Right: Light Yagami in a cold spotlight. The title 'DEATH NOTE ONLINE' should appear in a hand-written gothic font with a subtle 'ink bleed' animation. 2. CHAPTER GRID: Design cards that look like 'Case Files'. Use a vertical 3-column layout. Each card features a textured paper background, a red 'Top Secret' stamp, and the chapter title in typewriter font. 3. NAV: A minimalist top bar with 'L' and 'Kira' symbols as toggle buttons for site-wide color shifts (Cold Blue vs Blood Red).
generation_prompts.seo_geo_strategy: Activate 'seo-geo' and 'ai-seo' skills to target Global markets. Generate meta-tags and localized structured data for 'Read Death Note Manga Online'. Use the 'schema-markup' skill to inject 'ComicSeries' JSON-LD to dominate Google rich snippets for 'Death Note All Chapters'.
generation_prompts.technical_files: Generate robots.txt, a dynamic sitemap.xml for 108 chapters, and a .htaccess file for high-security headers. Use 'seo-sitemap' to prioritize the 'Latest Chapter' and 'Manga List' URLs.

technical_architectures.image_workflow: Convert all chapter scans to AVIF via 'python-performance-optimization'. Implement 'Lazy-Loading' using 'Intersection Observer' so the 'Case File' images only load when scrolled into view.
technical_architectures.tag_integration: Inject G-32THHV9JQF tracking via a global head-inject script. Ensure it tracks 'Chapter Read' events to analyze user engagement across all 108 chapters.

interactive_elements: Ink-Bleed Hover: Hovering over links causes a red 'ink' spread effect.
Investigation Progress: A top-of-page progress bar styled as an 'Evidence Timeline'.
Shinigami Flicker: Occasional 0.1s glitch flicker of Ryuk's silhouette in the background.
Typewriter Loading: Chapter cards reveal text with a mechanical typewriter sound and animation.
